mapper.sql: select student_no, user_id, student_name, id_card, age, gender, grade, class_name, phone, email, address, enrollment_date, status, create_time, update_time from sys_student
mapper.update: update sys_student set user_id = #{userId}, student_name = #{studentName}, id_card = #{idCard}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, grade = #{grade}, class_name = #{className}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, address = #{address}, enrollment_date = #{enrollmentDate}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} where student_no = #{studentNo}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_student where student_no in
#{studentNo}
mapper.select: select count(*) from sys_student where student_no = #{studentNo}
select count(*) from sys_student where user_id = #{userId}
select distinct name from stu_course where student_id = CAST(#{studentNo} AS SIGNED)
